title: Parliamentary inquiry demanded over fossil fuel industry’s extensive engagement in Australian youth programs
description: A significant debate is intensifying across Australia regarding the pervasive presence of the fossil fuel industry within educational institutions, local schools, and community sports organizations. Lawmakers, including independent senator David Pocock and members of the Greens party, are vocally advocating for a comprehensive parliamentary inquiry to scrutinize these arrangements, which they characterize as a deliberate [...]

title: Why did Anant Ambani shave his head at Tirupati? The ancient tradition explained
description: The Reliance heir's recent visit to the Tirumala Sri Venkateswara Swamy Temple drew attention for one simple yet powerful act. Here's why millions of devotees, regardless of status or wealth, choose to offer their hair at one of India's most sacred shrines.

title: Forgotten fossil in drawer confirmed as Antarctica's first Dinosaur bone - Firstpost
description: Forgotten fossil in drawer confirmed as Antarctica's first Dinosaur bone Firstpost See more headlines & perspectives on Google News

title: Forgotten fossil in drawer confirmed as Antarctica's first Dinosaur bone
description: A fossil that remained unnoticed in a museum drawer for nearly four decades has been identified as the first dinosaur bone ever discovered in Antarctica, offering new insights to the scientific community

title: Koreanosaurus, 1st dinosaur fossil named after Korea to become natural monument
description: Korea's first indigenous dinosaur fossil to bear the country's name in its scientific classification is set to be designated a natural monument, the Korea Heritage Service said Monday. The agency said it plans to designate the Koreanosaurus boseongensis skeletal fossil discovered in Boseong, South Jeolla Province, as a natural monument, along with the pig-nosed turtle skeleton fossil from Yeosu (Pleurochayes yeosuensis) and the Tafoni weathering pits of Suudo Island in Tongyeong.
